external_references.description: ITOCHU. (2024, January 24). The Endless Struggle Against APT10: Insights from LODEINFO v0.6.6 - v0.7.3 Analysis. Retrieved April 17, 2026.
Tomonaga, S. (2024, July 16). MirrorFace Attack against Japanese Organisations. Retrieved April 17, 2026.
Trend Micro. (2024, November 19). Spot the Difference: Earth Kasha's New LODEINFO Campaign And The Correlation Analysis With The APT10 Umbrella. Retrieved April 17, 2026.

objects.description: [MirrorFace](https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G1054) has employed malicious macros and native Windows tools such as csvde.exe, nltest.exe and quser.exe for discovery.(Citation: ITOCHU LODEINFO JAN 2024)(Citation: Trend Micro Earth Kasha NOV 2024)(Citation: JPCERT MirrorFace JUL 2024)
